description: Data Activator rule definitions for AgriTech Analytics greenhouse monitoring. These rules detect anomalies in real-time sensor telemetry and trigger automated responses via Teams, email, and Fabric notebooks.

rules.name: Temperature Deviation Alert
rules.description: Fires when any zone's air temperature deviates more than 3°C from its crop setpoint for longer than 2 consecutive minutes. Covers both overheating (cooling failure, excess solar gain) and undercooling (HVAC failure, boiler offline).

condition.description: Triggers when absolute temperature deviation exceeds 3°C for at least 2 minutes continuously

template.title: 🔴 Temperature Alert — {{zone_id}}
template.body:
Zone **{{zone_id}}** in **{{greenhouse_id}}** has deviated **{{temp_deviation_c}}°C** from setpoint.

- Current: {{air_temperature}}°C
- Target: {{target_temperature}}°C
- Duration: >2 minutes
- Crop at risk: {{crop_name}}

template.subject: [CRITICAL] Temperature Deviation in {{zone_id}} — {{greenhouse_id}}

actions.description: Triggers the HVAC anomaly response notebook to log the incident, query blast radius via graph, and optionally close vents

auto_resolve.message: ✅ Temperature in {{zone_id}} has returned to within 1.5°C of setpoint.

rules.name: Equipment Offline While Needed
rules.description: Fires when critical equipment is offline but environmental conditions require it. Two sub-conditions: (1) heating output = 0 when temperature is 2°C+ below setpoint, or (2) irrigation flow = 0 during a scheduled irrigation cycle when moisture is dropping.

sub_conditions.name: Heating Offline While Cold
sub_conditions.description: Heating is producing zero output while the zone is more than 2°C below setpoint

sub_conditions.name: Irrigation Offline During Cycle
sub_conditions.description: Irrigation pump is signaled ON but flow meter reads zero (pump failure or pipe blockage)

template.title: 🔴 Equipment Failure — {{zone_id}}
template.body:
Critical equipment offline in **{{zone_id}}** ({{greenhouse_id}}).

- Heating Output: {{heating_output}}%
- Irrigation Flow: {{irrigation_flow}} L/min
- Air Temp: {{air_temperature}}°C (target: {{target_temperature}}°C)
- Substrate Moisture: {{substrate_moisture}}%

Immediate inspection required.

template.subject: [CRITICAL] Equipment Failure in {{zone_id}} — {{greenhouse_id}}
template.body:
Automated alert: Critical equipment is offline in {{zone_id}}.

Heating Output: {{heating_output}}%
Irrigation Flow: {{irrigation_flow}} L/min
Current Temp: {{air_temperature}}°C
Target Temp: {{target_temperature}}°C
Moisture: {{substrate_moisture}}%
Timestamp: {{timestamp}}

Refer to the appropriate runbook (HVAC Failure or Irrigation Failure) in the operations manual.

actions.description: Triggers equipment failure response: logs incident, queries equipment dependency graph, identifies cascade risks

auto_resolve.condition: (heating_output > 0 OR air_temperature >= target_temperature - 1) AND (irrigation_pump == false OR irrigation_flow > 0)
auto_resolve.message: ✅ Equipment in {{zone_id}} has resumed normal operation.

rules.name: Nutrient Drift — pH/EC Correlated Deviation
rules.description: Fires when both pH and EC deviate from setpoints simultaneously, indicating nutrient solution contamination or dosing pump malfunction. pH deviation > 0.5 AND EC deviation > 0.3 mS/cm sustained for 3+ minutes.

condition.description: Both pH and EC are drifting outside acceptable ranges simultaneously — high-confidence nutrient contamination signal

template.title: 🟡 Nutrient Drift — {{zone_id}}
template.body:
Correlated pH/EC deviation detected in **{{zone_id}}** ({{greenhouse_id}}).

- pH: {{substrate_ph}} (target: {{target_ph}}, deviation: {{ph_deviation}})
- EC: {{substrate_ec}} mS/cm (target: {{target_ec}}, deviation: {{ec_deviation}})
- Duration: >3 minutes
- Crop: {{crop_name}}

Check dosing pump and nutrient tank.

template.subject: [WARNING] Nutrient Drift in {{zone_id}} — {{greenhouse_id}}

actions.description: Triggers nutrient drift analysis notebook: trend analysis, dosing pump correlation, crop impact assessment

auto_resolve.message: ✅ Nutrient levels in {{zone_id}} have returned to target range.

rules.name: Cold Chain Temperature Exceedance
rules.description: Fires when post-harvest product temperature exceeds 5°C during transit or cold storage, indicating refrigeration unit failure or door seal breach. This rule monitors AlertEvents of type 'cold-chain-break' or direct temperature readings from cold chain sensors.

condition.description: Triggers immediately when a cold-chain-break alert with anomaly score > 0.7 is ingested — no sustained duration required as this is a food safety event

template.title: 🔴 COLD CHAIN BREAK — {{greenhouse_id}}

template.subject: [FOOD SAFETY] Cold Chain Break — {{greenhouse_id}} — {{timestamp}}

actions.description: Triggers cold chain response notebook: logs food safety incident, generates compliance report, queries weather correlation

auto_resolve.description: Cold chain breaks require manual acknowledgment — auto-resolve is disabled for food safety compliance

notification_throttle.description: Prevents alert fatigue by limiting notifications to 3 per zone per hour

escalation.description: Unacknowledged critical alerts escalate to VP Operations after 30 minutes
